expectations.text: Recommends npm workspaces or pnpm workspaces (not a heavy orchestrator)
Does NOT recommend Bazel, Pants, Buck2, or Rush for 2 packages
Provides a minimal workspace config (package.json or pnpm-workspace.yaml)
Shows basic project structure with shared lib and app
expectations.evidence: Directory tree with packages/shared and packages/app, plus full package.json and source files

expectations.text: Keeps the solution simple — no unnecessary tooling
expectations.evidence: 126 lines total, npm-only, mentions future upgrades (TypeScript, ESLint, Changesets) as 'only when you actually need them'
